policy.title: Terms of Service
policy.summary: These terms describe the rules for using DharmaFlow, including account responsibilities, acceptable use, and how the service may change.
policy.content:
# Terms of Service

These Terms of Service govern your use of DharmaFlow. By using the app, you agree to these terms.

## Who can use the app

You must follow applicable laws and the rules in these terms. If you are under the age required to consent to online services where you live, a parent or guardian must consent on your behalf.

## Accounts and security

- You are responsible for the activity on your account.
- Keep your sign-in credentials secure and tell us if you believe your account was compromised.
- We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

## Acceptable use

You agree not to:

- Break the law or encourage others to do so.
- Attempt to access or interfere with the service, other users, or our systems.
- Upload or share content that is unlawful, harmful, or infringes the rights of others.

## Content and intellectual property

The app and its branding, code, and design belong to DharmaFlow or its licensors. You keep rights to your profile content, but you grant us permission to host and display it as needed to provide the service.

## Changes and availability

We may add, remove, or change features, and we may stop providing the service at any time. We will try to provide notice when changes are significant.

## Disclaimers

The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind to the extent permitted by law.

## Limitation of liability

To the extent permitted by law, DharmaFlow is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of data, revenue, or profits.

## Termination

You can stop using the app at any time. We may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these terms or if required for safety or legal reasons.

## Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to the email or URL below.

platformCompliance.googlePlay: States the basic rules of use, explains account responsibility and termination, and provides a support contact.
platformCompliance.appleAppStore: Provides user-facing terms for account usage and acceptable conduct, includes support contact and a deletion request path.
